summary: Completed frontend testing for TRACEGUARD personal safety app fixes. All 9 requested features verified successfully. Apple sign-in removed, Google sign-in working, Find Safety page using real OpenStreetMap/Overpass API data for Police/Hospitals/Barracks with Leaflet dark theme map.
passed_tests: Login page - Only Google Sign-in button visible (Apple removed)
Login page - Google Sign-in button shows 'Continue with Google'
Login page - No Apple sign-in button present
Login page - Email/password login works correctly (testuser@example.com)
Login page - Redirects to home after successful login
Find Safety page - Page loads with data-testid='find-safety-page'
Find Safety page - Compass displays heading in degrees (0° North)
Find Safety page - Share Location button visible and working
Find Safety page - Police filter shows real police stations from OpenStreetMap
Find Safety page - Hospital filter shows real hospitals with red markers on map
Find Safety page - Barracks filter shows military installations with green markers
Find Safety page - Map loads with dark theme (CARTO tiles via Leaflet)
Find Safety page - User location shown as green marker on map
Find Safety page - Places list shows numbered results with distance (e.g., 431m, 3.3km)
Find Safety page - Go button present for each place to open navigation
Find Safety page - Your Location section shows coordinates (6.524400, 3.379200)
Find Safety page - Emergency Hotlines visible (112 Emergency, 199 Police, 767 LASEMA)
Find Safety page - Save Offline button present
Find Safety page - Refresh button available for places list
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend testing completed for TRACEGUARD fixes. All 9 features verified: 1) Apple sign-in removed from Login.js, 2) Google sign-in remains working, 3) Email/password login functional, 4) Find Safety page uses Leaflet map with dark CARTO tiles, 5) Real places fetched from OpenStreetMap Overpass API, 6) All 3 filters work (Police/Hospital/Barracks) with colored markers, 7) Compass shows degrees, 8) Share Location button present, 9) Places list shows distance and Go button. No issues found.

find_safety_page.hospital_filter: Working - Shows real hospitals with red markers
find_safety_page.barracks_filter: Working - Shows military installations with green markers
find_safety_page.compass: Displays heading in degrees with direction name
find_safety_page.places_list: Shows numbered places with distance and Go button
